WITNESS LIST FILED
MINUTES FOR SEP-21-2015 10:45 AM

COURT TRIAL ON SEP-21-2015 OFF CALENDAR - JUDGMENT ENTERED. AFTER THE COURT TRIAL HEARING, COURT RENDERS JUDGMENT FOR THE PLAINTIFF AND AGAINST THE DEFENDANT FOR $ 66,874.25. JUDGE RICHARD ULMER, JR., CLERK KEVIN LEE, CSR NOT ON THE RECORD, D306
